title: On load, Scrub/Explore mode shows a timeline stage with seeded event pins or markers for MediaTimeline
On load (or after opening Library/Filter), the events list shows multiple seeded events with title and year visible
After creating an event titled 'Signal Tower Demo' with a valid year, the text 'Signal Tower Demo' is visible in the events list
After adding 3 new events on top of the initial user-managed count, the list shows exactly 3 more rows than before those creates
After filtering by a category/band (with mixed categories present), only matching events remain visible in the filtered list or stage
After editing an event title to 'Evening Broadcast', the text 'Evening Broadcast' is visible and the previous title is not
After deleting an event, that event's title is no longer visible in the events list
After deleting all user-managed events (or clearing the editable set), an empty state is visible in the list region
After submitting create with an empty required title, the events count does not increase and validation feedback is visible
After adjusting the year scrubber/window, the set of visible pins or in-view count updates without full page navigation
After switching between Scrub/Explore and Library/Filter modes, the main canvas shows the other mode without full page navigation
When hovering pins, list rows, or scrubber controls, a visible hover wash, scale, or glow appears
